subject: [OOF] Update configuration for NSST selection app in OOM charts
commit_message:
[OOF] Update configuration for NSST selection app in OOM charts

Added configuration for NSST selection app in OOF
to support NSST selection API in OPTF-OSDF

Issue-ID: OOM-3086
Signed-off-by: Aleem Raja <aleem.raja@t-systems.com>
Change-Id: I7969bb79a2b226d1140eacc953b40dd487789bcb
